titleStmt.title: SII 9.253: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 253. (A.R. No. 69 of 1904.) ON A SLAB LYING ON THE LEFT SIDE OF THE ENTRANCE TO THE BENAKAPPA TEMPLE AT ORUVAY, BELLARY TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is a little damaged and dated Śaka 1071, Vibhava, Pushya, śu. 10, Sōmavāra, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti corresponding probably to A.D. December 22 Wednesday, not Monday, as stated, the Uttarāyaṇa day falling on December 25 Saturday. It refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Jagadēkamalladēva (II) ruling from his capital Kalyāṇa. The Mahamāṇḍaleśvaras Kācharasa, Gaṅgarasa, Lōkarasa of Doravaḍi-naḍu, the brave general Lakheya-Nāyaka and his brothers Mādeya-Nāyaka, Virupeya-Nāyaka and Ācheya-Nāyaka, along with the Prabhu-gāvuṇḍas, Mūligas and the eight Hiṭṭus, caused the construction of the temples of Virūpākshadēva, at Kuta • • kanūr and of Bhōgēśvaradēva at Kuṟugōḍu and made grants of land for their worship, after washing the feet of the learned Bhīvarāśi-Paṇḍita. Bhīmarāśi-Paṇḍita is also stated to have set up Brahmēśvaradēva and Nīlakanṭhadēva at Hosakuttakanūru and endowed these temples with lands.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāma
racāravē . trailōkyanagarāraṁbha(ṁ)
mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti sama
stabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabhaṁ ma
hārājādhirāja paramēśvaraṁ paramabhaṭṭā
rakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷu
kyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatpratāpacakravartti jaga
dēkamalladēvavijayarājyamācaṁdrārkka
tāraṁbaraṁ sale kalyāṇada nelevīḍino
ḷsukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyu
ttamiśi śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvara
ddoravaḍināḍa kācarasa lōka
rasa gaṁgarasaru mukhyavāgi śrīmanma
hāpradhānaṁ mānanidhānaṁ malegaḷā
dityaṁ vitaraṇavikramādityaṁ jaṁguḷi
maṁneyaragaṁḍa nuḍidaṁtegaṁḍa gaṁḍaro
ḍḍaḷiva maṟevugekāva vairisāmaṁtasaṁ
hāraṁ raṇaraṁgadhīraṁ śōḍasayācaka
janēṣṭaphaḷapradāyakaṁ vidagdhayuvatīja
nakusmasāyakaṁ Iṁmaḍirācamalladē
varājyasamuddharaṇaṁ kṛtayugacaritrō
ddharaṇaṁ kappeyarāhāradānavinōda
kṛtanijaparijanāhlādaṁ vidviṣṭasāvaṁ
tavāhinītripuratrinētraṁ parāṁga

nāputraṁ śrībhī
mēśvaradēva
pādārādhakaṁ pa
rabaḷasādhakaṁ śrī
matu sāmaṁta la
khkheyanāyaka
ru taṁnoḍavu
ṭṭida mādeyanā
yaka virupe
yanāyaka Ā
ceyanāyaka
nuṁ taḷaparigraha
muṁ doravaḍi ye
ppattaṟa prabhugā
vuṁḍagaḷuṁ mū
ligaruveṁṭuhiṭṭu
gaḷu sahita kuta
kanūra virūpākṣa
dēvara sthānamumaṁ dō
nūra ḷa
dēvara sthānamumaṁ ne
le kuṟugōḍa bhō
gēśvaradēvara sthānamu
maṁ sakavaru
ṣa 1071 neya
vibhavasaṁvatsarada
puṣya śuddha 10 sō
mavāradaṁdu
ttarāyaṇasaṁkrāṁ

tiyalu svasti yamaniyamadhyānadhāra
ṇamōnānuṣṭhāṇajapasamādhiśīlasaṁ
paṁnaruṁ gurudēvadvijapūjāguṇōtpaṁna
ruṁ lākuḷāgamasamayasamuddhara
ṇaruṁ yaṁtrataṁtramaṁtrōddharaṇapravī
ṇaruṁ sakaladaruśanāgamāgamārtthakō
vidaruṁ śrīyoruvāya kalidēvala
bdhavaraprasādarappacaḷēśvarapaṁḍitara
makkaḷu bhīvarāśipaṁḍitara pādapra
kṣāḷanaṁ geydu dhārāpūrvvakaṁmāḍi ko
ṭṭaru . virūpākṣadēvara keyi gō
nūra holavēreyiṁ baḍagalu 60 gēṇaga
ḍiṁbadiṁ keṁnela matta 2 mahākāḷadēva
ra keyi nela kuṟugōḍa holavēreyiṁ
baḍagalu koḷeveḷḷamaḍavāgiyiṁ nesa
ṟuvāḍavā gaḍiṁbadiṁ takkila nela matta 2
bhōgēśvaradēvara keyiṁ koḷevaḷḷamaḍavā
giIṁ nesaṟuvāḍavā gaḍiṁbadiṁ takkila ne
la matta 2 Ī dharmmavaṁ pratipāḷisi dava
rgge vāraṇāsiyalu savatsasahasradhē
nuvaṁ sahasra brāhmaṇargge dānaṁmā
ḍida phalavakku I dharmmavanaḷidavargge
Ā sthānadalanisu kavileyu
mananibaru brāhmaṇarumanaḷida
pātakavakku . © mattaṁ hosakuttukanūralu
Oruvāya kalidēvara sthānapati bhīvarā
śipaṁḍitaru bra(ṁ)hmēśvaradēvaruvaṁ nīlakaṇ
ṭhadēvaruvaṁ pratiṣṭhemāḍi Āyara
sugaḷa kaiyalu mūliga haṁpagauḍa

nuṁ Eṁṭu hiṭṭugaḷu
virddu kuḍe haḍeda vri
tti brahmēśvaradēvara ke
yiṁ kudurevaḷḷama
ḍavāgi hiriyagaḍiṁ
badiṁ(diṁ) nesaṟuvāḍa ta
kkila nela matta 2 mattaṁ vi
rūpākṣadēvara ke
yiṁ mūḍalā gaḍiṁ
badiṁ kennela cadura
sa matta 1 nīlakaṁṭhadē
vara kaiyi doravaḍi
ya dāri maḍavāgi
nēsaruvāḍavā gaḍiṁba
diṁ takkila nela matta 2 Ī
dhar(ṁ)mavaṁ pratipā
ḷisidavargge vāraṇāśi
yalu sāyira ka
pileyaṁ sahasra brā
hmaṇargge koṭṭa phalavakku
Ī dhamar(ṁ)mavana
ḷidavargge yā sthānadala
nisu kavileymuna
nibaru brāhmaṇaru
maṁ koṁda pātakavakku .
Digital edition of SII 9.253 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
